description_long: This is a sealed package of Faragello Frozen Green Spinach, featuring a predominantly white background with green spinach leaves and a bowl of spinach depicted on the front. The front side displays the Faragello brand logo in red and white, along with product information in both English and Arabic. The back side contains a detailed nutrition facts panel, multilingual product descriptions, and additional branding elements. The packaging is a soft, flexible plastic bag, slightly puffed due to the contents and air inside. The sides of the bag are narrow, showing only a hint of the printed graphics and the seam. The overall appearance is clean, modern, and visually appealing, suitable for display in a grocery or urban food retail environment.
description: A white, flexible plastic bag of Faragello Frozen Green Spinach with green spinach graphics, red branding, and detailed nutritional labeling.
description_view_0: Front view shows the Faragello logo, product name, spinach imagery, and bilingual labeling.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the narrow profile of the bag with partial graphics and seam visible.
description_view_2: Back view displays the nutrition facts panel, multilingual product information, and additional branding.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the bag's slim edge and partial graphics.
attribute_brand_logo: The Faragello brand logo is visible on the front and back, featuring a red rectangular background with white text and a stylized 'F' above it.
attribute_flavor_indication: The front of the package clearly indicates 'Frozen Green Spinach' with images of spinach leaves and a bowl of spinach.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: A nutrition facts panel is visible on the back, listing calories, serving size, and other nutritional information.
